name_en: B's new medium woven cardholder is an essential everyday item. Made of cowhide with a smooth texture. It has 6 card slots and a middle compartment for cash. Lightweight and compact, perfect for small bags. Available in many colors. Dimensions: 11 x 7.5 cm
name_cn: B's new medium woven cardholder is an essential everyday item. Made of cowhide with a smooth texture. It has 6 card slots and a middle compartment for cash. Lightweight and compact, perfect for small bags. Available in many colors. Dimensions: 11 x 7.5 cm
